basic_details.job_title: IIM Kashipur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Academic Assistant / Academic Associate Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Management Kashipur Academic Assistant / Academic Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 20 May 2026 on the official website IIM Kashipur. A total of various vacancies have been announced through the IIM Kashipur Academic Assistant / Academic Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in the relevant area (Finance/Accounting/Finance and Accounting), Postgraduate with first class or M.Phil or higher; ACA, AICWA, B.Tech/B.E., MCA also eligible
qualification.details: Academic Associate: Ph.D. in the relevant area (Finance/Accounting/Finance and Accounting) Academic Assistant: A Postgraduate with first class. Relevant experience either in academics or industry or an M. Phil [or higher qualification] will be preferred. Candidates with qualifications like ACA, AICWA, B. Tech. / B.E., MCA will also be eligible.

salary_details.details: Academic Associate: ₹ 33,000/- to ₹ 39,000/- per month Academic Assistant: ₹ 27,500/- to ₹ 32,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kashipur Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kashipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Kashipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the IIM Kashipur Academic Assistant/Associate posts is 09 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for Academic Associate?
faq.answer: For the Academic Associate position, candidates must possess a Ph.D. in the relevant area of Finance, Accounting, or Finance and Accounting.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Academic Assistant/Associate posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for Academic Assistant?
faq.answer: The salary for the Academic Assistant post ranges from ₹ 27,500/- to ₹ 32,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What are the selection methods for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview, which can be conducted in person or online.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Academic Assistant/Associate are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. Which mode of application is accepted?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is AA-05/2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIM Kashipur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Kashipur is located in Kashipur, Uttarakhand.
